description: Wo Shing Wo is the oldest of the Wo Group triad societies in Hong Kong, founded in Sham Shui Po in 1930. It is involved in extortion, drug trafficking, gambling, and prostitution. The group has expanded its influence from Tsuen Wan to other parts of Hong Kong and operates globally, including in China, Macau, and Europe. It continues to use traditional Hongmen initiation ceremonies.

country_links.evidence_quote: A 1992 internal report by the Asian division of the Victoria Police documented Wo Shing Wo activity in Melbourne . The group is involved in the importation of heroin into Australia from Southeast Asia
country_links.context: WSW is involved in heroin importation and other crimes in Melbourne.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Wo Shing Wo has a presence in Antwerp , where it is active in heroin trafficking, money laundering, gambling and illegal workshops. The group also uses Belgium as a transit port for illegal immigrants.
country_links.context: WSW has a presence in Antwerp, active in heroin trafficking, money laundering, and uses Belgium as a transit port for illegal immigrants.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Wo Shing Wo was established in Toronto in 1930 as an international branch of the Wo Hop To... The Wo Shing Wo deal cocaine to the people in Hong Kong Kowloon and Macau.
country_links.context: WSW was established in Toronto and deals cocaine to people in Hong Kong Kowloon and Macau.

country_links.evidence_quote: a new branch across the border in Shenzhen (1997)... WSW's drug dealing activities and key criminal activities spread to China
country_links.context: WSW established a branch in Shenzhen and spread drug dealing activities to China.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Wo Shing Wo is among five triad groups active in France. These gangs cooperate with Albanian and Turkish groups in the importation of heroin from the Golden Triangle .
country_links.context: WSW is among five triad groups active in France, cooperating with Albanian and Turkish groups in heroin importation.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Wo Shing Wo is active in Dublin and Cork . Triads gained a firm foothold in Ireland in the 1980s... the trafficking of women and children from China into Ireland, involvement in casinos, and money laundering.
country_links.context: WSW is active in Dublin and Cork, involved in trafficking women and children, casinos, money laundering, and cannabis operations.

country_links.evidence_quote: WSW's drug dealing activities and key criminal activities spread to China, Japan, Thailand and Australia.
country_links.context: WSW's drug dealing activities and key criminal activities spread to Japan.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Wo Shing Wo branch in the Netherlands was founded and primarily operates in Rotterdam . In the 1970s, the group battled the 14K and Ah Kong for control of the heroin trade in Amsterdam .
country_links.context: WSW branch founded in Rotterdam, operates heroin trafficking, gambling, prostitution, money laundering, and other crimes.

country_links.evidence_quote: Since the mid-1980s, the Wo Shing Wo has been one of four Hong Kong triad groups operating in South Africa, predominantly in Johannesburg and Cape Town .
country_links.context: WSW operates in Johannesburg and Cape Town, involved in fraud, drug trafficking, firearms smuggling, and other crimes.

country_links.evidence_quote: WSW's drug dealing activities and key criminal activities spread to China, Japan, Thailand and Australia.
country_links.context: WSW's drug dealing activities and key criminal activities spread to Thailand.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Wo Shing Wo operates in London , Manchester , Portsmouth , Birmingham , Liverpool and Glasgow . Authorities believe the Wo Shing Wo is the largest triad group in the country.
country_links.context: WSW operates in London, Manchester, Portsmouth, Birmingham, Liverpool, and Glasgow, involved in heroin and counterfeit goods distribution.
